attributes.description: Incorporated in 1985, Ajmera Realty and Infra Limited (ARIIL) is in the business of providing residential and rented commercial properties. The company has a presence in the cities like Mumbai, Bengaluru, Ahmedabad in India as well as in foreign countries such as Bahrain and UK [1]
